limitations: The research is limited to synthetic ticket data and does not establish production accuracy or performance.
Regex-based redaction can produce false positives and false negatives, especially for novel or structured formats.
Encryption, retention enforcement, access control, telemetry, CLI behavior, and manual-review integration are proposed but not implemented by this research-only branch.
Attachments, HTML, ambiguous identifiers, and unsupported payload types require manual review before any production rollout.

work_packets.deliverable: Define user stories, stable acceptance IDs, rollout gates, and the delivery checklist.
Formalize redaction rules, review-ticket encryption and retention, access controls, and audit requirements.
Implement the incident-triage library and JSONL CLI in a subsequent delivery change, with no raw-ticket persistence.
Build a synthetic-ticket generator, deterministic acceptance harness, privacy-negative tests, and CI integration.

final_head_sha_semantics: Set after PR creation to the immutable delivery-content commit immediately preceding the completion-metadata-only commit; a Git commit cannot embed its own SHA.
